examples: An interactive program compiled with QB and its result are also provided.
Diuron (DCMU) blocks the electron transporting from QA to QB in the thylakoid membrane.
To help interact, QB has a laser pointer, twin high-resolution cameras, a 3.5-in. touch screen, and speakers.
With the very next pick, the Jets sent their QB situation spiraling into further chaos.
The center -- and his offensive line -- know the QB's planning to pass.
